title: Extreme poverty has fallen in most regions since 1950
subtitle: Poverty rate by region (%)
source: World Bank Poverty and Inequality Platform, Mahler et al. 2026, Mahler et al. 2025.
visdescription: Global extreme poverty has fallen from about 60 percent in 1950 to about 10 percent in 2025
keyFactLabel: of people worldwide live in extreme poverty today, compared to 60% in 1950
